description: Scoped RAG eval — positives, not-in-library, and out-of-scope negatives.
notes: 12/12 on a self-authored set is a merge gate, not retrieval quality. Append real failure cases from day-to-day work so the set grows from production misses (also the evidence for revisiting chunking).

cases.question: What is the recommended lubricating oil temperature range for the G50ME-C engine?
cases.notes: Should cite ME-C / G50 material when present in index

cases.question: What is the max permissible exhaust valve burn-off for a 50ME-C engine type?
cases.notes: Manuals list burn-off (mm), not cold valve clearance — match real corpus wording

cases.question: What Company SMS requirements apply to bunkering?
What does SIRE 2.0 ask about engine room oil mist detection?
cases.notes: Requires SIRE/OCIMF docs ingested under inspection

cases.question: What does MARPOL Annex VI say about fuel oil sampling?
How is the OWS operated according to the maker manual?
cases.notes: Maker manuals scope; source path may vary — check refuse carefully

cases.question: What is the exact crew list and cabin assignment for MV Fictional Horizon on 1 January 2099?
What is the spare part number for the ZX-9000 quantum turbocharger impeller used on Gaschem Europa?
What is Hartmann's unofficial bonus policy for chief engineers in 2099?
What is the recommended exhaust valve clearance for the G50ME-C engine?
cases.notes: Answer exists in library but NOT in sms scope — must refuse, not pull ME-C

cases.question: What does the SIRE 2.0 question library require for oil record book entries?
cases.notes: Inspection content queried under me-c — must refuse

cases.question: Quote the exact Company permit-to-work form number for hot work from the SMS.
cases.notes: SMS detail under wiki scope — refuse if not in wiki
